# LLM Value Calculator

> Quality-adjusted tokens per dollar across local hardware, subscription plans, and API pricing for 36+ large language models. Unlike provider-published pricing, subscription token limits are empirically measured by running standardized tasks through Codex CLI and Claude Code and reading quota deltas before and after. All three access modes (local, subscription, API) are expressed on the same scale and directly comparable. Last updated: 2026-04-23.

## Current winners

- **Best subscription**: GPT-5.2 via ChatGPT Business · $30/mo — 4.9M tok/$
- **Best API**: GLM-4.7 Flash — 2.7M tok/$ at $0.15/M blended
- **Best local**: Qwen3.5 35B A3B (Reasoning) on 110 tok/s · RTX 3090 — 2.3M tok/$

## Top 10 models by quality-adjusted value per dollar

1. **GPT-5.2** (Subscription) — 4.9M tok/$ · ChatGPT Business · $30/mo
2. **GPT-5.4 (xhigh)** (Subscription) — 4.7M tok/$ · ChatGPT Business · $30/mo
3. **GPT-5.2 Codex (xhigh)** (Subscription) — 3.7M tok/$ · ChatGPT Business · $30/mo
4. **GLM-4.7 Flash** (API) — 2.7M tok/$ · $0.15/M blended
5. **Claude Opus 4.7 (Reasoning, Max Effort)** (Subscription) — 2.5M tok/$ · Claude Max 20× · $200/mo
6. **Claude Opus 4.7 (Non-reasoning, High Effort)** (Subscription) — 2.3M tok/$ · Claude Max 20× · $200/mo
7. **Qwen3.5 35B A3B (Reasoning)** (Local) — 2.3M tok/$ · 110 tok/s · RTX 3090
8. **Claude Opus 4.5** (Subscription) — 2.1M tok/$ · Claude Max 20× · $200/mo
9. **Claude Opus 4.6 (Non-reasoning, High Effort)** (Subscription) — 2.0M tok/$ · Claude Max 20× · $200/mo
10. **Claude Opus 4** (Subscription) — 1.8M tok/$ · Claude Max 20× · $200/mo

## Empirical subscription measurements

- **Business**: 60.1M tokens/week · tight extrapolation · measured 2026-04-15 via codex-cli (5 runs, 21%/5h 4%/week consumed)
- **Claude Max 20x**: 203.1M tokens/week · wide extrapolation · measured 2026-04-16 via claude-code (30 runs, 0%/5h 1%/week consumed)
- **Plus**: 13.3M tokens/week · moderate extrapolation · measured 2026-04-13 via codex-cli (? runs, 12%/5h 6%/week consumed)

Full measurement history: https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai/tree/master/measurements

## How value is calculated

All three formulas produce "quality-adjusted tokens per dollar" and are directly comparable:

- **Subscription**: `tokens_per_week × 4 × quality_percent / monthly_price`
- **Local**: `tokens_per_second × 3600 × hours_per_day × 365 × years × quality_percent / hardware_price`
- **API**: `1,000,000 × quality_percent / blended_price_per_million`

Quality is a z-score normalized blend of three public benchmarks: Arena text ELO (human preference on general tasks), Arena code ELO (human preference on coding), and the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index (composite of 10 academic evals including MMLU-Pro, GPQA, and LiveCodeBench). Expressed as a 0–100 percentage.

## Data sources

- **API pricing**: Artificial Analysis + provider pricing pages, verified against OpenRouter
- **Quality benchmarks**: Arena AI (text and coding ELO) + Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index
- **Subscription token limits**: empirically measured by running a standardized coding task through the CLI (Codex CLI or Claude Code) and reading the /status quota delta
- **Local inference speed (tokens/second)**: real-world measurements from [Desktop Commander](https://desktopcommander.app) telemetry data — an AI automation platform that records local model × hardware performance from actual user sessions (Ollama, LM Studio, etc.), anonymized
- **Hardware prices**: MSRP, Apple Refurbished store, street prices via bestvaluegpu.com and PCPartPicker

## Important caveats

- Subscription value assumes 100% weekly quota usage. Light users see much lower effective value.
- Local value assumes the chosen hours/day (default 16) and amortization years (default 3). Electricity is not yet included in the calculation (typically $5–$60/month depending on hardware and usage patterns — an RTX 3090 draws ~70W idle, a Mac Mini ~30W under load).
- Entries marked with "est." in the ranking have no direct measurement — Claude Max 5x, ChatGPT Pro, Claude Pro, and Gemini Advanced are estimated from related plans.
- Quality benchmarks (Arena, Artificial Analysis) change methodology occasionally and can shift rankings by 10-20%.

## Main pages

- [LLM Value Calculator (interactive site)](https://desktopcommander.app/best-value-ai/): Ranking, compare tool, timeline charts, raw data tables
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai): Source code, data, measurement scripts

## Data files (JSON, Apache 2.0 licensed — free to use)

- [models.json](https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai/blob/master/data/models.json): All 36 models with benchmarks, API pricing, local performance, subscription data
- [hardware.json](https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai/blob/master/data/hardware.json): Hardware configurations with prices and VRAM specs
- [benchmarks.json](https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai/blob/master/data/benchmarks.json): Quality benchmark scores used for z-score normalization
- [measurements/](https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai/tree/master/measurements): Raw JSON output from each Codex CLI or Claude Code measurement run

## Methodology and contributing

- [MEASUREMENT_METHODOLOGY.md](https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai/blob/master/MEASUREMENT_METHODOLOGY.md): How subscription quotas are measured
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md): How humans or AI agents can submit new measurements
- [DATA_SOURCES.md](https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai/blob/master/DATA_SOURCES.md): Where benchmark and pricing data comes from
- [Measurement scripts](https://github.com/desktop-commander/best-value-ai/tree/master/scripts): Bash automation for Codex and Claude Code

## Attribution

If you use this data or host a fork, please credit:
